aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Fast but unfocused

💼 Career: Tum kaam start karoge with full speed, par clarity missing hogi

❤️ Love: Jaldi react karna misunderstanding create karega

💰 Money: Impulsive खर्च avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Pehle samjho, phir act karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum action lete ho bina poora picture dekhe
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable progress

💼 Career: Tumhara steady effort strong result build karega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust grow karega

💰 Money: Practical approach se gain

🧘 Advice: Apni pace pe trust rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum consistency se hi jeette ho
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Scattered thoughts

💼 Career: Multiple tasks se focus break hoga

❤️ Love: Mixed signals confusion create karenge

💰 Money: Small error cost kar sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Prioritize karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum sab kuch ek saath karne ki koshish karte ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer

🔥 Energy: Inner clarity

💼 Career: Tumhe samajh aa jayega kaun support karega

❤️ Love: Emotional connection deepen hoga

💰 Money: Safe decisions better rahenge

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhe sab pata hota hai, par maan ne me time lagate ho

♌ Leo

♍ Virgo

♎ Libra
